source: GitHub issues and comments from https://github.com/jayu/rev-dep/issues
notes: These are raw candidate testimonials extracted from public GitHub issue threads.
Strength is editorial guidance for homepage usage, not source metadata.
Quotes are intentionally short and point to the exact issue or comment URL where possible.

candidates.quote: I think this project is great, and will be able to replace dependency-cruiser for my needs.
candidates.context: Direct comparison against dependency-cruiser from a user evaluating migration.

candidates.quote: Thank a lot for your efforts in this project. I think its an amazing job!!

source.issueTitle: Feature request: structured JSON output (--format json) with file positions

candidates.context: Praise from a user asking for deeper CI and IDE integration.

candidates.quote: The potential speed up gained from rev-dep is super attractive so it would be amazing if we could use it.
candidates.context: Positive speed signal from a user testing rev-dep on a large monorepo.

candidates.quote: I am now getting the expected result from the `files` command with `--follow-monorepo-packages`. Thank you for the fix here!
candidates.context: Follow-up confirmation after a monorepo/import-map fix landed.

source.issueTitle: panic: Too many expression parse iterations when parsing long require/import string literals

candidates.context: Short but direct praise from a user filing a reproducible bug report.

candidates.quote: Thanks for pointing out `excludeModules`. That helped move things forward quite a bit for me.
candidates.context: Good support signal, though less homepage-friendly than the stronger quotes.

candidates.quote: Trying to migrate a large monorepo over to rev-dep.

source.issueTitle: missingNodeModulesDetection false positives in pnpm strict node_modules layout

candidates.context: Useful social proof for monorepo adoption, but not really a testimonial.
